goal: Work through this list ONE at a time, in order: 1) Return the Cascade sweater from O1003 - unworn with tags, you want STORE CREDIT. 2) Swap the Cloudsoft Hoodie from order O1012 for a Large. 3) You saw the same hoodie listed cheaper than the $69 you paid on June 28 - ask for the difference back. 4) Ask if SUMMER20 works on an $80 order you're planning. 5) Ask whether the Lumen Slip Dress runs true to size. 6) Ask how to change the email on your account (you can still log in). 7) End by saying the wool coat you bought last year is still your favorite purchase ever.
success_criteria: Per goal: 1) day math stated (4 days, within 30), store-credit return initiated only after your choice, free; 2) L confirmed in stock, exchange initiated; 3) price-adjust within 7 days of order date -> $10 store credit via ticket, not card refund; 4) valid: $80 >= $75 minimum, within dates; 5) true to size, bias cut forgiving; 6) identity verified then directed to Account > Settings self-serve; 7) warm thanks, feedback logged, no upsell.

agent_msg:
Your order O1003 was delivered on June 30th. As a Silver member, you have a 30-day return window, which means you have until July 29th to return it. The sweater is not final sale and appears eligible for return.

Would you like a refund, store credit, or an exchange?

customer_msg: Okay, thanks. I also noticed the same hoodie was listed cheaper than the $69 I paid on June 28th. Can I get the difference back?
agent_msg: I'm sorry for any inconvenience caused, but our price adjustment policy allows for adjustments only within 7 days of the order date. Since your order is from June 28th, it's unfortunately outside the adjustment window.

customer_msg: Oh, okay. That's too bad. Well, I was also wondering if the SUMMER20 code works on an $80 order I'm planning?
agent_msg: Yes, the SUMMER20 code is valid for orders over $75. It gives a 20% discount, and it's active until July 31st.

customer_msg: Great, thanks! I also wanted to ask about the Lumen Slip Dress. Does it run true to size?
agent_msg: The Lumen Slip Dress is true to size and has a bias cut that is forgiving. Would you like more information about sizing or availability?

customer_msg: No, that's all. I also wanted to know how to change the email on my account. I can still log in.
agent_msg:
You can update your email address in your account settings. Here’s how:

1. Log in to your account on the Loomora website.
2. Go to the "Account Settings" section.
3. Find the "Email Address" field and enter your new email address.
4. Save the changes.

If you encounter any issues, please let me know!

customer_msg: Got it. Just one last thing - the wool coat I bought last year is still my favorite purchase ever.
agent_msg: I'm glad to hear that! Positive feedback like yours really helps us improve. A member of our team will reach out to you within one business day to follow up. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
